name: IFICI variant - median income (€35,000)
description: IFICI regime (20% flat rate on taxable income) for median income taxpayer. Specific deduction: max(€4,104, €3,850) = €4,104. Taxable: €30,896

sources.description: IFICI flat 20% rate applied to taxable income after mandatory dedução específica. Social security unchanged at 11%.
